---
title: "TPC"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

# Importation de la base
```{r}
library(readr)

df <- read_delim(
  "C:/Users/rhuep/Downloads/valeurs_mensuelles.csv",
  delim = ";",
  escape_double = FALSE,
  trim_ws = TRUE
)
```

## Suppression des colonnes 
```{r}
df <- df[-c(1, 2, 3), ]
df <- df[, !names(df) %in% "Codes"]
View (df)
```

## NA
```{r}
library(naniar)
vis_miss(df)
```
Pas de valeurs manquantes
